core.label: Dart Fundamentals
core.description: Syntax, types, null safety, and basic program structure.

topics.label: Setup & DartPad
topics.description: Install the Dart SDK and experiment with DartPad online. Dart runs on VM, compiles to JS, and to native.

topics.label: Variables & Types
topics.description: var, final, const, and explicit types. Dart is strongly typed with sound null safety.

topics.label: Null Safety
topics.description: Non-nullable by default — use Type? for nullable. Dart eliminates null reference errors at compile time.

topics.label: Control Flow
topics.description: if/else, switch, for, for-in, while, do-while. Switch supports patterns in Dart 3.

topics.label: Functions
topics.description: Arrow functions, optional/named parameters, and first-class functions. Functions are objects in Dart.

topics.label: Strings
topics.description: String interpolation with $var and ${expr}, multi-line strings, and common methods.

topics.label: Collections (List, Map, Set)
topics.description: Typed generic collections with rich APIs. Spread operator (...) and collection-if/for.

topics.label: Pattern Matching (Dart 3)
topics.description: Destructuring and matching with switch expressions and if-case. Modern Dart's most impactful feature.

topics.label: Records (Dart 3)
topics.description: Anonymous immutable aggregate types. Records enable multiple return values and structured data.

topics.label: Operators
topics.description: Cascade (..), null-aware (?., ??), spread (...), and type test (is, as) operators.

core.label: Object-Oriented Dart
core.description: Classes, mixins, extensions, and Dart's object model.

topics.label: Classes & Constructors
topics.description: Named, factory, const, and redirecting constructors. Dart has rich constructor syntax.

topics.label: Properties & Getters/Setters
topics.description: Final fields, computed properties with get/set. Properties are the idiomatic way to expose state.

topics.label: Inheritance
topics.description: Extend classes with extends and override methods. Dart supports single inheritance.

topics.label: Abstract Classes & Interfaces
topics.description: Abstract classes for partial implementations. Every class implicitly defines an interface.

topics.label: Mixins
topics.description: Reuse code across class hierarchies with mixin and with. Mixins solve the diamond problem.

topics.label: Enums
topics.description: Enhanced enums with fields, methods, and interface implementation (Dart 2.17+).

topics.label: Extension Methods
topics.description: Add methods to existing types without modifying them. Extensions improve API ergonomics.

topics.label: Sealed Classes (Dart 3)
topics.description: Restrict subclasses for exhaustive switch. Sealed classes enable algebraic data types.

topics.label: Generics
topics.description: Type-safe generic classes, functions, and methods. Dart generics are reified at runtime.

topics.label: Futures & async/await
topics.description: Handle asynchronous operations with Future and async/await. Foundation of Dart's async model.

topics.label: Error Handling in Async
topics.description: try/catch with async/await and .catchError on Futures. Handle async errors properly.

topics.label: Streams
topics.description: Async sequences of data with Stream. Listen to events, transform, and combine streams.

topics.label: Stream Controllers
topics.description: Create custom streams with StreamController. Bridge between imperative and stream-based code.

topics.label: Isolates
topics.description: True parallelism with isolates — separate memory, message passing. For CPU-heavy tasks.

topics.label: Generators
topics.description: sync* and async* for lazy and async iterable generation.

topics.label: Completer
topics.description: Create Futures manually with Completer for bridging callback APIs.

core.label: Packages, Testing & Tooling
core.description: Pub package manager, testing, and development tools.

topics.label: Pub & pubspec.yaml
topics.description: Manage dependencies with pub.dev and pubspec.yaml. Pub is Dart's package manager.

topics.label: Unit Testing
topics.description: Write tests with the test package — test(), expect(), group(), setUp/tearDown.

topics.label: Mocking (Mockito)
topics.description: Mock dependencies with the mockito package. Isolate units under test.

topics.label: Dart Analyzer & Lints
topics.description: Static analysis with the Dart analyzer and recommended lint rules.

topics.label: dart format
topics.description: Auto-format Dart code with the official formatter. Consistent style across all Dart projects.

topics.label: Libraries & Parts
topics.description: Organize code with library, import, export, and part. Dart's module system.

topics.label: Code Generation
topics.description: Use build_runner and source_gen for code generation. Powers json_serializable, freezed, etc.

topics.label: Effective Dart
topics.description: Follow Dart's official style guide for idiomatic, readable code.
